name: lsa
description: Living Spec Architecture — spec-first development methodology where specs are the permanent source of truth and every code/artifact change traces to a spec requirement. Eight skills enforce phases with human User Verifications: init, discover, specify, plan, verify, sync, reconcile, revise-constitution. Flow-aware (Quick/Standard/Extended — renamed from T1/T2/T3 in lsa v0.6.2) via core/flow-selector. Path-configurable via .lsa.yaml.
